def mystery(x):
    if not isinstance(x, str) or len(x) != 8:
        return False
    
    a, b = 0, 0
    for i in range(4):
        a = (a << 8) | ord(x[i])
        b = (b << 8) | ord(x[i+4])
        
    for _ in range(12):
        a ^= 0xDEADBEEF
        a = ((a << 7) | (a >> 25)) & 0xFFFFFFFF
        a = (a + b) & 0xFFFFFFFF
        
        b ^= 0xCAFEBABE
        b = ((b << 11) | (b >> 21)) & 0xFFFFFFFF
        b = (b + a) & 0xFFFFFFFF
        
    return a == 0xc7826622 and b == 0x386d34e9

def mystery(x):
    if not isinstance(x, str) or len(x) != 8:
        return False
    
    a, b = 0, 0
    for i in range(4):
        a = (a << 8) | ord(x[i])
        b = (b << 8) | ord(x[i+4])
        
    delta = 0x9E3779B9
    sum_val = 0
    for _ in range(8):
        sum_val = (sum_val + delta) & 0xFFFFFFFF
        a = (a + (((b << 4) + 0x636F6465) ^ (b + sum_val) ^ ((b >> 5) + 0x7A6F6E65))) & 0xFFFFFFFF
        b = (b + (((a << 4) + 0x62797465) ^ (a + sum_val) ^ ((a >> 5) + 0x736C6F74))) & 0xFFFFFFFF
        
    return a == 0xb46b9623 and b == 0x47e1136c
